key_finding: Cross-model REPLICATION CONFIRMED: cumV > cumText on Mistral-7B at 7-8/10 positions across ALL 4 layers. Bootstrap p=0.003 at L24 (strongest), p=0.016 at L16, p=0.037 at L8. Advantage is layer-independent (no depth trend, rho=-0.200). Advantage concentrated at late chain positions (60-100%). Effect larger on Mistral (+0.072-0.114) than Qwen (+0.055) despite fewer samples. CumK weaker than cumV on Mistral (unlike Qwen). Two model families now show the effect.
evidence_impact: MODERATE-STRONG evidence FOR the hypothesis. Cross-model replication with statistical significance at 3/4 layers substantially strengthens the cumV > cumText finding. The layer-independent profile suggests the advantage is a fundamental property of attention projections vs raw embeddings. Late-position concentration consistent with V vectors maintaining computation signal while text degrades through dilution.
next_planned: Pooled Qwen+Mistral significance test; residualize against problem numbers on Qwen data; investigate why L31 weaker than L24.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: COMPUTATION POSITIONS: V R=0.977 (exp_071). CUMULATIVE KV: cumV > cumText on BOTH Qwen (+0.055, 10/10, exp_076) AND Mistral (+0.072-0.114, 7-8/10, bootstrap p=0.003 at L24, exp_077). Cross-model replication with significance. Layer-independent. BEHAVIORAL: paraphrase uninformative. No early decodability gap.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: cumV > cumText replicated on 2 families (Qwen, Mistral).
